scholarly_methodology: Translations produced using (1) Phase-73 Ensemble SA consensus, (2) Phase-80/83/87/89 DEDR rebus expansion, (3) Phase-74 grammar model (M267=iN), (4) Phase-78 formula classification (chi2 p=0.855 site invariance).
